critiques.finding: Coaching card, title, dropdown, and disclaimer use prototype strings and style tokens that diverge from IR (Group_card_muted_, Text_heading_3_, Input_default_, Uncloud360 disclaimer).
critiques.alternative: Align copy verbatim with ai_RNbBHYWX/ai_RNbBHYWY/ai_RNbBHYWs, apply Group_card_, Text_heading_2_, Text_small_, and Dropdown_default_ per refs.json.

critiques.finding: Save button is disabled when mode is empty; Bubble coaching-save workflow allows empty selection and resets list to simplifier fallback.
critiques.alternative: Allow save with empty selection and route to updateCoachingModePreference simplifier branch for bTIiS parity.
